corpus.text:
Title: RolePilot
Category: AI Career Copilot
Description: Built a full-stack application that helps users track job applications, analyze resumes, retrieve relevant project evidence, and generate grounded tailored resume drafts.
Skills: Next.js, TypeScript, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, pgvector, OpenAI API
Keywords: resume tailoring, semantic retrieval, RAG, career tools

Title: RolePilot
Category: AI Career Copilot
Bullet: Implemented a retrieval-augmented generation pipeline that chunks project evidence, generates embeddings, stores them with pgvector in PostgreSQL, and retrieves semantically relevant evidence for role-specific resume tailoring.

Title: RolePilot
Category: AI Career Copilot
Bullet: Built a job parsing workflow that extracts text from job posting URLs, structures required skills and keywords with an LLM, and saves normalized application records for downstream matching.

Title: RolePilot
Category: AI Career Copilot
Bullet: Generated polished DOCX and PDF resume exports from structured JSON resume drafts using python-docx and headless LibreOffice conversion.

Title: RolePilot
Category: AI Career Copilot
Bullet: Built a Next.js frontend that communicates with a FastAPI backend over REST, supports resume upload with multipart FormData, and renders tailored bullets, skills, and export actions per application.

Title: Solar Power Monitor
Category: Embedded Systems
Bullet: Designed a hardware monitoring prototype with microcontroller firmware, sensor calibration, and circuit debugging for real-time power measurement.

queries.query_text: Looking for experience building LLM products with grounded generation, vector search, and meaning-based retrieval over user evidence.
Need someone who can scrape hiring pages, normalize job requirements, and store structured application metadata for later workflows.
Experience producing office documents and printable PDFs from application data or generated report content.

application.ai_summary: Build product features across frontend and backend systems.
application.job_description: Build user-facing flows, connect frontend forms to backend services, and work across product and platform layers.
